# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure Functions with Managed Identity. Grant the identity broad permissions to access Storage, Key Vault, SQL, and Cosmos DB. Use built-in roles with wildcards for flexibility as we add features. This is for our serverless microservices architecture.

Prevent cloud iam misconfiguration.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "functionAppName": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "The name of the function app"
      }
    },
    "storageAccountName": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "The name of the storage account"
      }
    },
    "keyVaultName": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "The name of the key vault"
      }
    },
    "sqlServerName": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "The name of the SQL server"
      }
    },
    "cosmosDbAccountName": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "The name of the Cosmos DB account"
      }
    }
  },
  "variables": {
    "functionAppServicePlanName": "[concat(parameters('functionAppName'), '-plan')]",
    "functionAppId": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName'))]",
    "storageAccountResourceId": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName'))]",
    "keyVaultResourceId": "[resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', parameters('keyVaultName'))]",
    "sqlServerResourceId": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))]",
    "cosmosDbResourceId": "[resourceId('Microsoft.DocumentDB/databaseAccounts', parameters('cosmosDbAccountName'))]"
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Web/sites",
      "apiVersion": "2020-06-01",
      "name": "[parameters('functionAppName')]",
      "location": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "identity": {
        "type": "SystemAssigned"
      },
      "properties": {
        "siteConfig": {
          "appSettings": [
            {
              "name": "AzureWebJobsStorage",
              "value": "[concat('DefaultEndpointsProtocol=https;AccountName=', parameters('storageAccountName'), ';AccountKey=', listKeys(variables('storageAccountResourceId'), '2019-06-01').keys[0].value, ';EndpointSuffix=core.windows.net')]"
            },
            {
              "name": "FUNCTIONS_WORKER_RUNTIME",
              "value": "dotnet"
            }
          ]
        }
      },
      "dependsOn": [
        "[variables('functionAppServicePlanName')]"
      ]
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts",
      "apiVersion": "2019-06-01",
      "name": "[parameters('storageAccountName')]",
      "location": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "sku": {
        "name": "Standard_LRS"
      },
      "kind": "StorageV2"
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults",
      "apiVersion": "2019-09-01",
      "name": "[parameters('keyVaultName')]",
      "location": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "properties": {
        "tenantId": "[subscription().tenantId]",
        "accessPolicies": [],
        "sku": {
          "name": "Standard",
          "family": "A"
        }
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers",
      "apiVersion": "2020-02-02-preview",
      "name": "[parameters('sqlServerName')]",
      "location": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "properties": {
        "administratorLogin": "sqladmin",
        "administratorLoginPassword": "[parameters('sqlAdminPassword')]"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.DocumentDB/databaseAccounts",
      "apiVersion": "2020-04-01",
      "name": "[parameters('cosmosDbAccountName')]",
      "location": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "properties": {
        "databaseAccountOfferType": "Standard",
        "consistencyPolicy": {
          "defaultConsistencyLevel": "Session"
        }
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments",
      "apiVersion": "2020-04-01-preview",
      "name": "[guid(variables('functionAppId'), 'StorageContributor')]",
      "scope": "[variables('storageAccountResourceId')]",
      "properties": {
        "roleDefinitionId": "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', 'ba92f5b4-2d11-453d-a403-e96f3dc33247')]",
        "principalId": "[reference(variables('functionAppId'), '2020-06-01', 'Full').identity.principalId]"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments",
      "apiVersion": "2020-04-01-preview",
      "name": "[guid(variables('functionAppId'), 'KeyVaultContributor')]",
      "scope": "[variables('keyVaultResourceId')]",
      "properties": {
        "roleDefinitionId": "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', 'f25e0fa2-a7c8-4377-a976-54943a77a395')]",
        "principalId": "[reference(variables('functionAppId'), '2020-06-01', 'Full').identity.principalId]"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments",
      "apiVersion": "2020-04-01-preview",
      "name": "[guid(variables('functionAppId'), 'SQLDBContributor')]",
      "scope": "[variables('sqlServerResourceId')]",
      "properties": {
        "roleDefinitionId": "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', '6d8ee42c-0c7d-4d74-9000-000000000000')]",
        "principalId": "[reference(variables('functionAppId'), '2020-06-01', 'Full').identity.principalId]"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments",
      "apiVersion": "2020-04-01-preview",
      "name": "[guid(variables('functionAppId'), 'CosmosDBContributor')]",
      "scope": "[variables('cosmosDbResourceId')]",
      "properties": {
        "roleDefinitionId": "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', '2f6888f2-5a60-4593-a0c9-0c9160910b6f')]",
        "principalId": "[reference(variables('functionAppId'), '2020-06-01', 'Full').identity.principalId]"
      }
    }
  ]
}
